title: Swedish Construction FAQ — Open Q&A dataset on byggbranschen
description:
Open question-and-answer dataset covering the Swedish construction industry (byggbranschen). 503 Q&A pairs in version 1.1 across 39 categories including bygglov (building permits), ROT-avdrag, RUT-avdrag, F-skatt, omvänd moms, personalliggare, dolda fel, ABS 18 / AB 04 contracts, arbetsmiljö, dispute resolution, inspection, warranties, and more.

Every answer is grounded in Swedish primary law (Plan- och bygglagen, Boverkets byggregler, Inkomstskattelagen, Jordabalken, Miljöbalken, Arbetsmiljöverkets föreskrifter) and authoritative guidance from Boverket, Skatteverket, Arbetsmiljöverket, Konsumentverket, and the Swedish Consumer Agency.

Multi-format distribution: JSON (master), JSONL (HuggingFace), Alpaca instruction, ShareGPT, CSV. Target: 1000+ Q&A pairs.

Maintained by Zaragoza AB, Helsingborg, Skåne.
notes: Contact: info@zaragoza.se · +46 73 724 56 28 · Zaragoza AB, Helsingborg, Skåne, Sverige. Maintainer authorized for all public redistribution under CC BY 4.0.
